/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,picogk.so -o lib/picogk.so CMakeFiles/picogk.dir/Source/PicoGKGLTexture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/picogk.dir/Source/PicoGKGLViewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/picogk.dir/Source/PicoGKLibrary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/picogk.dir/Source/gl/gl.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib Lib/libopenvdb.a Lib/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so /usr/local/lib/libblosc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_iostreams.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
